pr_text:
## Title: Fix buffer overflow vulnerability in RRCConnectionReconfiguration_BR encoder

### Summary
The `do_RRCConnectionReconfiguration_BR` function in the LTE RRC subsystem encodes ASN.1 RRC connection reconfiguration messages into a provided buffer. Previously, the function called `uper_encode_to_buffer()` but did not validate whether the resulting encoded data fit within the supplied `buffer_size`. If the encoded message exceeded the buffer capacity, the function would still return the encod
